creator: max@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

The update applied with some changes including: 

- Add a patch to change a line in Makefile.in that syas PREFIX=/usr/local 
to PREFIX?=/usr/local so that the PREFIX setting is respected. 
- Add MAKE_ENV= LANG=${MANLANG} so that the man page goes to correct 
place even if the user doesn't have LANG set to ja_JP.EUC. 
- Use ${INSTALL_DATA} to install the doc file. 
- ${MKDIR} -p -> ${MKDIR}.
